common.questionCount: {count, plural, =0 {No questions} one {# question} other {# questions}}
common.studentCount: {count, plural, =0 {No students} one {# student} other {# students}}

validation.timeLimitMin: Time limit must be at least 1 minute
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters
validation.difficultySum: Difficulty mix must sum to the question count

errors.roomClosed: This room is not accepting new students
errors.genUnavailable: AI generation is temporarily unavailable. Try again shortly.
errors.genRateLimit: AI rate limit reached on the free tier. Try again in a moment.
errors.genNotConfigured: AI generation is not configured. Set OPENROUTER_API_KEY (free at openrouter.ai).
errors.genBadKey: AI generation rejected the API key. Check OPENROUTER_API_KEY.
errors.genInvalidQuiz: AI could not produce a valid quiz. Try again or rephrase the topic.
errors.importParseFailed: Could not parse quiz text. Check the format.
errors.importNoCorrect: Question "{q}" must have at least 1 correct answer

import.parsedBadge: {count, plural, one {# question parsed} other {# questions parsed}}
import.generateTagline: — describe a topic, get questions to edit
import.emptyPreview: Start typing — questions will appear here.
import.toastGenerated: {count, plural, one {Generated # question — review & edit below} other {Generated # questions — review & edit below}}
